reviews.review_description: This bottle shooting game is incredibly fun and keeps me coming back for more.  I especially enjoy how the difficulty ramps up gradually-it keeps things interesting and challenging without being frustrating. It's the perfect game to unwind with during some free time. If you're into shooting or casual games.

Real bottle shooting game is the really good game for the beginner shooter to learn and know how to aim and shoot its really has good 3d bottle shooting graphics like Real hunting games experience learning us to target shooting training with bottles here is some different weapons as sniper training guns so you can aim and shoot, really good and smooth controls and aiming.

reviews.review_title: ⭐"The Most Addictive VR Game I've Played
reviews.review_description:
"VR Bottle Shooter is insanely fun! The sound of bottles smashing in slow motion is super satisfying, and the aiming feels incredibly accurate. The controls are smooth, and I love how the levels get more challenging with moving targets and time limits.

It’s the perfect mix of arcade fun and shooting practice. The graphics are sharp, the environments feel real, and I even got my friends hooked on it. We keep trying to beat each other's high scores!

This game really makes you feel like you're in a carnival or shooting range. If you're looking for something easy to jump into but hard to master — this is it. Highly recommend to all VR lovers!"

If you love aim-based games, this one nails it. The levels get more challenging, but the learning curve is just right. It’s fun, fast, and has that 'just one more round' feel. Easily one of my favorite VR shooting games!"
I love target shooting. This game is fun with enough challenge to make things interesting.

VR Bottle Shooter starts off simple — a basic gun, limited bullets, and slow reload — but quickly hooks you with its clear sense of progression. As you rack up experience and collect shards, you’ll unlock upgrades and access a growing arsenal of more powerful weapons.

The levels are well-crafted and offer good variety, keeping the gameplay fresh and engaging. If you’ve enjoyed Gun Club VR, this one will feel like a solid indie counterpart with its own charm.

Best of all, the developers are active and clearly invested in improving the experience. Looking forward to seeing what new content and upgrades they bring next.

developer_response.body: Thansk for your support. Ofcourse we are planning new leves with more gun for this games. You will see soon.

reviews.review_description: An easy-to-use app for playing bottle shooting games and has great features for its users with a very simple and fast user interface.

If you love aim-based games, this one nails it. The levels get more challenging, but the learning curve is just right. It’s fun, fast, and has that 'just one more round' feel. Easily one of my favorite VR shooting games!"

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're thrilled to hear that you find our game so addictive and enjoyable. We'd love to know what kept it from being a full 5-star experience for you—your feedback helps us improve and deliver an even better VR adventure. Looking forward to making your next experience even more amazing!

reviews.review_description: Clips don’t clip.  Mags don’t spawn. No info how to get more ammo. No practise level available til you’ve completed 3 stages??? Clunky. Help vid/animation is not helpful. Boring. I’d give it no stars but have to do as to submit review!

developer_response.body:
Hello! RedTiga.
What issue you found in video tutorial? Also May we know more about what you mean Clips, Mags and Ammo in your review? About practice levels its not training for shooting (that already there in video clip), Actually its like free firing level that can be unlock after 3 levels.
UPDATE : Can you please check latest version 1.5 I hope you will like it. Its with various features added and made with complete accuracy and quality standered.  If you like new version We request you to please change the rate and review. 
Thanks.
